differential_diagnoses: Interictal dysphoric disorder with acute psychotic features
next_steps: Continuous video-EEG monitoring to differentiate ictal vs. postictal vs. interictal events
CSF analysis including paraneoplastic and autoimmune encephalitis panels
Review of current pharmacotherapy for potential drug-drug interactions or adverse behavioral effects
Psychiatric consultation for acute management of severe agitation and paranoia
Structural re-evaluation of brain imaging to rule out rapid progressive pathology
Structured collateral history regarding the nature of the patient's ictal experiences and personality baseline
